---
title: "{{ name }}"
format: html
engine: julia
---

# Set up Julia environment

```{julia}
#| label: load_libraries

using DataScienceOperations
using QuartoTools
const DSO = DataScienceOperations
```

Load the stage-specific 'params.yaml' config using the `read_params(..)` function. This function specifically loads
only the stage-dependent parameters that are defined in the 'params' section of the 'dvc.yaml' file.

```{julia}
#| label: read_params
#| echo: false

params_obj = DSO.read_params("{{ rel_path_from_project_root }}")
```

# Session info

```{julia}
#| label: session_info

DSO.session_info()
```
